/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libauv_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libauv_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/auv_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/auv_interfaces/msg/bot_pose__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/ros_workspace/src/build/auv_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libauv_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
